description: Capability for the main window. Every native affordance this shell adds (tray icon/menu, autostart, notifications, global hotkey, deep links) is wired entirely on the Rust side in src/lib.rs's setup() -- the capabilities system only gates commands the WEBVIEW invokes, and the webview here is the unmodified shell-0 web build, which invokes none of them. `core:default` is the baseline every Tauri window needs; nothing else is granted because nothing else is asked for.
